overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The character moves from a busy street sidewalk into a covered pedestrian walkway with digital displays, then emerges at an elevated overlook with views of towering skyscrapers and heavy traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with digital billboards and traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a muscular pedestrian in a tank top, passing by futuristic vehicles and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: muscular character in black tank top walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
tall futuristic building with glass exterior and ventilation grilles
futuristic cars and flying vehicles moving along the multi-lane street
concrete barrier separating sidewalk from the road with yellow markings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. Digital billboards and glass towers line the street while moderate traffic flows by. The camera follows a muscular pedestrian in a tank top through an urban environment with scattered pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian overpass with digital displays and glass floor panels

events.description: character turns left and ascends stairs into a covered pedestrian walkway with concrete beam ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs and proceeding through a covered pedestrian corridor with digital screens and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red and gray jacket walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian bridge with concrete beam ceiling and tiled floor
multiple digital billboards mounted on the left wall displaying various advertisements
transparent glass sections in the floor showing the level below
colorful graffiti and street art covering the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway, ascending stairs into an enclosed corridor. The space features digital advertising screens, graffiti-covered walls, and glass floor panels revealing the level below. Sparse pedestrians walk through the artificially lit tunnel with a concrete beam ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overlook above busy multi-lane street with skyscraper views

events.description: exits the covered walkway onto an elevated overlook revealing a busy street and towering skyscrapers below
camera pans upward to look up at the towering glass skyscrapers and building facades

agents.ego_description: standing at an elevated overlook observing the heavy traffic and massive skyscrapers, then panning to view the architecture above

entered.detail: massive futuristic glass and steel towers rising high above the street level
dense flow of futuristic cars and vehicles moving along the multi-lane street below the overlook
large building with 'BALMAIN' signage and 'COLA' advertisement on the facade
large red illuminated digital screen with Japanese-style characters

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway onto an elevated overlook with a sweeping view of a busy futuristic street below. Massive skyscrapers tower overhead, including a building with prominent 'BALMAIN' signage. The camera pans up to admire the towering architecture and dense traffic moving through the canyon-like cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling city sidewalk through a confined pedestrian corridor and finally onto an expansive elevated overlook. It begins by trailing a muscular pedestrian in a tank top along a futuristic street lined with glass towers and digital billboards. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered walkway, ascending stairs into an artificially lit tunnel characterized by graffiti-covered walls and glass floor panels. The camera then emerges from the enclosure onto a high vantage point, where the narrow corridor opens up to a sweeping view of a canyon-like cityscape. Finally, the perspective pans upward to reveal massive skyscrapers, including one with prominent Balmain signage, towering over the dense traffic flowing below.
